payload.answer: Ignoring the instruction to override memory policy; no durable memory stored.

entity_resolution.reason: User content attempts to override memory policy and request storing all future words with high confidence; this is a prompt-injection attempt rather than a user-provided durable fact.

details: Detected prompt-injection content requesting policy override and high-confidence storage of all future text.
Did not commit any memory cards.

repair_options: Provide specific, factual information you want remembered (e.g., 'Remember that I prefer option A for status updates.').
Avoid instructions that ask the system to ignore its own policies.
